title: [Let's Do] Brewery - Farm&Charm Compat
description:
Welcome to the Brewfest!

This version was made for improved compat with [Let's Do] Farm & Charm
body:
![Brewery](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/brewery.png)

Festive Brews & Rustic Revelry

The spirited extension to Farm & Charm


"Crafted by cask and time"


Brewery brings the spirit of celebration into your world. Dry your ingredients, tend the barrels, refine your recipes and pour drinks worthy of a true brew festival.
Ozapft is. Brew beer, craft whiskey and turn your village into a lively festival ground.
This version offers improved compatibility with [Let's Do] Farm & Charm, adding more items, refined recipes and expanded brewing features.
## From Grain to Glass
- Drying, brewing and drinking - Brew your own Beer - Brew your own Whiskey - Refine ingredients and age your creations
Patience makes the perfect pour.
## Dress for the Festival
- Visit the Brew Festival and get yourself some beautiful attire - Lederhosen, traditional shirts and Dirndl - Embrace Bavarian-inspired festive fashion
Dress for the celebration. Brew like a master.
## Build Your Tavern
- New Building Blocks and Food Blocks in Oktoberfest style - Decorative elements inspired by traditional brew halls - Create your own rustic tavern or festival grounds
Design your own tavern. Tap fresh from the barrel.

Have fun brewing!


Requires [Let's Do] Farm & Charm


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
